EventData.Data: Sink to receive asynchronous callbacks for WMI client application
Microsoft Malware Protection Command Line Utility
Microsoft Malware Protection Command Line Utility
Microsoft Malware Protection Signature Update Stub

%%SystemRoot%%\system32\csrss.exe ObjectDirectory=\Windows SharedSection=1024,20480,768 Windows=On SubSystemType=Windows ServerDll=basesrv,1 ServerDll=winsrv:UserServerDllInitialization,3 ServerDll=sxssrv,4 ProfileControl=Off MaxRequestThreads=16

%%SystemRoot%%\system32\csrss.exe ObjectDirectory=\Windows SharedSection=1024,20480,768 Windows=On SubSystemType=Windows ServerDll=basesrv,1 ServerDll=winsrv:UserServerDllInitialization,3 ServerDll=sxssrv,4 ProfileControl=Off MaxRequestThreads=16
Sink to receive asynchronous callbacks for WMI client application
Microsoft Malware Protection Command Line Utility
System Guard Runtime Monitor Broker Service
WMI Reverse Performance Adapter Maintenance Utility
Microsoft Malware Protection Command Line Utility
Microsoft Malware Protection Command Line Utility
Microsoft Malware Protection Command Line Utility
Microsoft Malware Protection Command Line Utility
print ("[*] Host requested Sysmon logs. Exporting...")
print (f"[*] Sandbox Agent listening on port 8000...")
print (f"[*] Waiting for host controller to send payload...")

print (f"[*] Sandbox Agent listening on port 8000...")
